name: Montana Capital Car Title Loans
description_short: Montana Capital Car Title Loans Pacoima, California — Montana Capital offers car title loans from $100–$50,000 with no credit check, same-day funding, a...
description_long:
Montana Capital Car Title Loans is a California-based title lending company operating under the MontanaCapital® brand since 2007. The company claims to have assisted more than 375,000 customers with emergency financing needs and positions itself as a trusted, accessible alternative to traditional lenders for borrowers with impaired credit histories.

The company offers secured loans ranging from $100 to $50,000, using the borrower's vehicle title as collateral. Borrowers retain possession and full use of their vehicle throughout the loan term, receiving the title back upon final payment. Applications can be submitted online or by phone (1-888-508-5366), with pre-approval available in under five minutes and same-day fund disbursement via direct deposit or Bank of America check at physical pickup locations.

Montana Capital explicitly targets borrowers with poor credit, prior bankruptcies, or those turned away by conventional lenders. Their online application runs 24/7 and does not trigger a hard credit inquiry during pre-approval, so there is no score impact from checking rates. Customer reviews on Google (4.5 stars) highlight same-day turnarounds, courteous staff, and streamlined processing. One reviewer noted disbursement arrives as a Bank of America check rather than cash, which may be inconvenient for some.

Title loans are among the highest-cost borrowing products available, typically carrying triple-digit APRs. Montana Capital does not disclose interest rates, fees, or APR ranges anywhere on their public website, making cost comparison impossible before engaging a representative. Borrowers who cannot repay risk vehicle repossession. The 59 Google reviews covering 375,000+ claimed customers represents an extremely low review density for the claimed volume. This product is appropriate only as a genuine last resort when lower-cost alternatives — credit union PALs, personal loans, or employer advances — are unavailable.
pros: Loan amounts up to $50,000 based on vehicle equity — unusually high ceiling for a title lender
No credit check required; bad credit and prior bankruptcies explicitly accepted
Borrower keeps and drives the vehicle throughout the full loan term
Free pre-approval in under 5 minutes with no hard credit pull and no score impact
Same-day funding available via direct deposit or in-person pickup
Operating since 2007 with 375,000+ customers served — established track record
cons: No APR, interest rate, or fee information disclosed anywhere on the website — impossible to compare costs before calling
Title loans typically carry triple-digit APRs; failure to repay risks vehicle repossession
Disbursement issued as a Bank of America check at pickup locations, not cash — may add friction
Only 59 Google reviews despite 375,000+ claimed customers — review density inconsistency
Loan terms and state availability not disclosed on the public website
best_for: Vehicle owners with bad credit or bankruptcy history who cannot qualify for unsecured loans
Borrowers needing same-day emergency funds with a clear plan to repay quickly
People with significant vehicle equity seeking higher loan amounts than payday or cash advance lenders offer
Consumers who need to retain and use their vehicle while accessing its equity
diagnosis: Montana Capital is best for vehicle owners with damaged credit who need fast access to larger sums ($1,000–$50,000) and have no lower-cost options available. The main caveat is significant: the company discloses no rates or fees publicly, title loans are consistently among the most expensive consumer debt products, and defaulting means losing your vehicle — borrowers should exhaust all alternatives before applying.
services: No hard credit inquiry during pre-approval
In-person cash pickup at branch locations
